context_text: <B> [ yeah i actually ] i had i had i used to be in a relationship like that and i actually um one of the first things i said to the person i'm seeing now / <A> mhm / <B> is i said you know you have to be straight with me and honest with me even if it means that it's going to be difficult and that the outcome of you being honest with me is that i'm going to get upset and that you'll have to deal with the communication that surrounds having been honest with me about something that is a problem for me and if you can't be that you know i said you have to be honest with me to the point where you might lose me you know / <A> right / <B> like you might actually say something to me that's honest but as a result of saying it i end not wanting to be part of the relationship and i said but if you can't do that then i i can't see you and i also said and if if i find out that you weren't straight with me about something that you you know that that you you didn't deal with you weren't straight with me because you didn't want to deal with the consequences of what it meant then you definitely will lose me and i won't and and i've kind of like stuck by that in the sense that you know past situations recently / <A> mhm / <B> have ended things because of things like that and so he kind of understood that there was really clear but he also understood the reasons behind it like he kind of understood that he could trust me not to overreact if he told me something like you know i'm having some concerns about something or i you know i went out last night with my ex girlfriend and had dinner / <A> right
